name: AWS S3 Object Copied with SSE-S3 Encryption
description: An S3 object was copied using Server-Side Encryption with Amazon S3-managed keys (SSE-S3). While this is common for secure storage, repeated or unexpected copies within the account could indicate data staging for potential exfiltration. Review access logs and destination details to confirm if this action was legitimate.

rules.name: AWS S3 Object Copied with SSE-S3 Encryption

author: Sunil Bharti & David Agni
